evals.name: Plan Review Flow
evals.question: Does the skill clearly instruct agents on how to submit a plan for review and handle the response?
evals.pass_criteria: Submit plan → wait for feedback → handle approve/reject is explicit
evals.fail_criteria: Flow is unclear or missing steps

evals.name: Hook Integration
evals.question: Does the skill clearly explain how the ExitPlanMode hook triggers plannotator automatically?
evals.pass_criteria: Hook trigger mechanism is clear for the agent's platform
evals.fail_criteria: Hook mechanism is buried or unclear

evals.name: Feedback Handling
evals.question: Does the skill clearly instruct agents to read structured feedback and replan when changes are requested?
evals.pass_criteria: Feedback parsing and replan loop is explicit
evals.fail_criteria: Agent doesn't know what to do with 'request changes' feedback

evals.name: Code Review Pattern
evals.question: Does the skill clearly instruct agents on when and how to launch diff review after coding?
evals.pass_criteria: Code review trigger and usage is clear
evals.fail_criteria: Code review is unclear or missing

evals.name: Platform Routing
evals.question: Does the skill clearly route agents to the correct integration method per platform?
evals.pass_criteria: Platform-specific paths are clear and distinct
evals.fail_criteria: Platforms are mixed or agent can't determine correct path

test_inputs.description: Plan the authentication feature (Claude Code, ExitPlanMode hook)
Review the plan before coding (Codex CLI, manual invocation)
Review my last commit diff (code review, not plan review)

key_changes: Added Key Rules section at top — 6 agent-actionable rules
Added Platform Routing Table — all 4 platforms in one glance
Rewrote plan review as explicit numbered agent workflow
Added Feedback Handling section with replan loop diagram
Added Annotation Guidance table — maps annotation type to agent action
Removed 130-line Obsidian section from main skill file
Removed Pattern 1, 2, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10 from main skill file
